memories.content: This project uses PostgreSQL 15 with pgvector extension for vector similarity search on document embeddings
All database migrations must be reversible -- always include a down migration function
The notification service runs at internal-api.company.com:8080 and requires Bearer token auth
Never use ORM eager loading in this project -- always use explicit joins for performance. This was decided after the N+1 query incident in Q3.
Error responses must follow RFC 7807 Problem Details format: { type, title, status, detail, instance }
Frontend uses Zustand for state management, NOT Redux. Team decision from 2024-Q4 architecture review.
